calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Authorizing And Approving Compromise, Settlement And Partial Allowance Of Creditors Claim
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances; Michael Anthony Roosevelt for George F. Montgomery II (Personal Representative).

The Court stated that the matter was on for a preliminary distribution and that there were two issues. As to the issue of Probate Code Section 10804 Mr. Robertson stated that there is an agreement on file dated September 12, 2008. The Court noted it had looked at it. Mr. Robertson presented argument regarding the second issue stating that the fees should not be reduced for the reasons set forth on the record. The Court stated that its thinking was in alignment with counsel's and granted the petition (subject to review of the written order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy S. McDaniels.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
